metadata.title: Canadian Retail Banking - Savings Products Data
metadata.disclaimer: Data collected via web research on March 18, 2026. Rates are subject to change without notice. This is not financial advice. Always verify rates directly with the respective bank before making decisions.

bank_of_canada_rate.notes: Held at 2.25% amid economic uncertainty. Unemployment rose to 6.7%.

expiry_alerts.alert: EXPIRED - new client signup window closed March 16. Existing enrolled clients still receive promo for 153 days from enrollment.
EXPIRED - new client signup window closed March 16. Existing enrolled clients still receive promo for 153 days from enrollment.
New client signup window ends April 30, 2026. Promo rate lasts 153 days from enrollment.
New client promo. Enrollment open until June 9, 2026. Rate lasts 3 months from account opening.
Requires opening eligible BMO chequing account. Promo lasts 120 days from account opening.

accounts.base_rate_note: Posted base rate for existing clients
accounts.promo_details: 4.60% promotional rate for new clients for 3 months (until June 9, 2026)
accounts.joint_account_notes: Standard RBC joint account rules apply
accounts.debit_transactions: Unlimited free online transfers to other RBC accounts. ATM withdrawals: $5 per debit transaction.

source_freshness.source_name: RBC official website via NerdWallet Canada

accounts.base_rate_note: Tiered rate: 0.02% on balances <$3K and $3K+
accounts.joint_account_notes: Standard RBC joint account rules apply
accounts.debit_transactions: 2 free transactions per month. Additional transactions: $2 each.

accounts.base_rate_note: Tiered structure: $5K-$25K base tier shown; higher rates at $25K+ and $100K+
accounts.e_transfer_notes: Not standard feature for this product
accounts.joint_account_notes: Standard RBC joint account rules apply
accounts.debit_transactions: Limited transaction access. Fee per transaction.
features: Tiered rate structure based on balance

accounts.base_rate_note: Minimal posted rate
accounts.joint_account_notes: Standard TD joint account rules apply
accounts.debit_transactions: Unlimited free transfers between TD accounts. Non-TD transfers: $2 per transaction.

source_freshness.source_name: TD official website via NerdWallet Canada

accounts.base_rate_note: Rate applies only to balances $10,000+. Below $10K earns 0%
accounts.joint_account_notes: Standard TD joint account rules apply
accounts.debit_transactions: $5 per transaction.
features: Tiered structure with $10K minimum for premium rate

accounts.base_rate_note: Highest tiered base rate at $500K+. Boosted rates apply with eligible chequing + 2 of 3 qualifying transactions
accounts.joint_account_notes: Standard TD joint account rules apply

rate_tiers.condition: Eligible TD chequing account + 2 of 3 qualifying transactions
rate_tiers.note: Boost adds 0.50% to base tier rate. Requires qualifying chequing + 2 qualifying transactions

accounts.debit_transactions: Unlimited free transfers between TD accounts. Standard transfer fees apply for external transfers.
features: Boosted rates with chequing + qualifying transactions
new_features: Boosted rate structure with qualifying transaction incentives

accounts.base_rate_note: Posted base rate
accounts.promo_details: 4.50% promotional rate for 120 days (until June 1, 2026) for new clients with eligible chequing account
accounts.joint_account_notes: Standard BMO joint account rules apply
accounts.debit_transactions: Unlimited free online transfers. Counter withdrawals: $5 per transaction.
features: Promotion requires eligible BMO chequing account

source_freshness.source_name: BMO official website via NerdWallet Canada

accounts.base_rate_note: Base rate increases up to 0.60% with $200+ monthly deposits
accounts.joint_account_notes: Standard BMO joint account rules apply
accounts.debit_transactions: 1 free withdrawal per month. Additional withdrawals: $5 each.

accounts.base_rate_note: Minimal posted rate
accounts.joint_account_notes: Standard BMO joint account rules apply
accounts.debit_transactions: Unlimited free withdrawals.

accounts.base_rate_note: Base rate for standard tier. Promotional period has higher rate.
accounts.promo_details: 4.65% promotional rate for 90-day premium period (4.70% Preferred tier, 4.75% Ultimate tier). Interest forfeited if withdrawn during premium period.
accounts.joint_account_notes: Standard Scotiabank joint account rules apply
accounts.debit_transactions: Withdrawals during premium period forfeit interest. 1 free non-package withdrawal per month outside premium period. Additional withdrawals: $2 each.
features: Interest forfeiture on early withdrawal during premium

accounts.base_rate_note: Minimal posted rate
accounts.joint_account_notes: Standard Scotiabank joint account rules apply
accounts.debit_transactions: 1 free withdrawal per month. Additional withdrawals: $2 each.

accounts.base_rate_note: 0.10% non-registered, 0.25% in registered plans (TFSA/RRSP/RESP/RRIF/RDSP)
accounts.cdic_notes: Direct CDIC coverage as Scotiabank is a CDIC member institution. $100K per depositor per insured category.
accounts.e_transfer_notes: Via linked Scotiabank chequing account. Not directly from Accelerator.
accounts.joint_account_notes: Available for joint accounts. Standard Scotiabank eligibility rules apply.
accounts.debit_transactions: Unlimited no-fee self-service transfers (Scotia OnLine, mobile, phone). $5 service charge for in-branch transactions.
features: Available in registered plans (TFSA, RRSP, RESP, RRIF, RDSP)
new_features: Cash Bonus Bundle Offer available March 3 - July 2, 2026

accounts.base_rate_note: Base rate can increase to 0.70% with Smart Interest (save $200+/month)
accounts.promo_details: ~5.25% promotional rate for new clients for 90 days
accounts.joint_account_notes: Standard CIBC joint account rules apply
accounts.debit_transactions: Unlimited free online transfers. Counter withdrawals: $5 per transaction.

source_freshness.source_name: CIBC official website via NerdWallet Canada

accounts.base_rate_note: Youth account for ages 18 and under
accounts.joint_account_notes: Youth accounts are individual only
accounts.debit_transactions: Limited transaction access appropriate for youth accounts.

accounts.base_rate_note: Base rate increases to 2.75% with $2,000+ monthly direct deposits (1.00% base + 1.75% bonus)
accounts.cdic_notes: Direct CDIC coverage via Equitable Bank
accounts.joint_account_notes: Standard EQ Bank joint account rules apply

rate_tiers.note: 1.75% bonus rate on top of 1.00% base

accounts.debit_transactions: Unlimited free online transactions and transfers. Functions as hybrid chequing+savings account.

source_freshness.source_name: EQ Bank official website via Ratehub.ca

accounts.base_rate_note: Posted rate for 10-day notice period
accounts.cdic_notes: Direct CDIC coverage via Equitable Bank
accounts.e_transfer_notes: Not available on notice accounts. Transfer to Personal account first.
accounts.joint_account_notes: Not available on notice savings accounts
accounts.debit_transactions: 10-day withdrawal notice required. No e-Transfers. Withdrawals available after notice period.
features: Higher rate due to notice period

accounts.base_rate_note: Posted rate for 30-day notice period
accounts.cdic_notes: Direct CDIC coverage via Equitable Bank
accounts.e_transfer_notes: Not available on notice accounts. Transfer to Personal account first.
accounts.joint_account_notes: Not available on notice savings accounts
accounts.debit_transactions: 30-day withdrawal notice required. No e-Transfers. Withdrawals available after notice period.
features: Highest EQ Bank base rate due to 30-day notice

accounts.base_rate_note: Tax-free rate for TFSA account
accounts.cdic_notes: CDIC coverage applies to eligible deposits within TFSA limits
accounts.e_transfer_notes: Not available on TFSA. Transfer to Personal account first.
accounts.joint_account_notes: TFSA accounts are individual only under CRA rules
accounts.debit_transactions: Standard TFSA withdrawal rules apply. No e-Transfers.

accounts.base_rate_note: Estimated ~1.50% for RRSP account
accounts.cdic_notes: CDIC coverage applies to RRSP deposits
accounts.e_transfer_notes: Not available on RRSP. Standard RRSP withdrawal rules apply.
accounts.joint_account_notes: RRSP accounts are individual only under CRA rules
accounts.debit_transactions: Standard RRSP withdrawal rules apply. Subject to withholding taxes. No e-Transfers.

verification.contradiction_note: Rate not explicitly confirmed on primary source; estimated based on product structure

accounts.base_rate_note: Tax-free interest. Not available to Quebec residents.
accounts.cdic_notes: Direct CDIC coverage via Equitable Bank. FHSA is a separate eligible deposit category under CDIC.
accounts.e_transfer_notes: Must transfer to EQ Bank Personal Account first, then e-Transfer from there.
accounts.joint_account_notes: FHSA is individual only by CRA rules. Cannot be held jointly.
accounts.debit_transactions: Transfers to other EQ Bank accounts are free. Withdrawals are tax-free if used for qualifying first home purchase. Non-qualifying withdrawals are taxable.
features: Annual contribution limit $8,000 (unused room carries forward up to $8,000)
Tax-free qualifying withdrawals for first home
Can transfer between RRSP and FHSA
new_features: Canada's first fully digital no-fee FHSA Savings Account

accounts.base_rate_note: Posted base rate
accounts.promo_details: 4.50% promotional rate for 5 months (153 days). Available to new clients by March 16, 2026. Up to $1M eligible.
accounts.cdic_notes: Direct CDIC coverage via Tangerine Bank (direct member)
accounts.joint_account_notes: Standard Tangerine joint account rules apply
accounts.debit_transactions: Unlimited free withdrawals and transfers.

accounts.base_rate_note: Core tier base rate. Premium (1.75% at $100K+ assets) and Generation (2.25% at $500K+ assets) also available.
accounts.cdic_partner: Multiple partner institutions (up to $1M combined coverage)
accounts.cdic_notes: CDIC coverage via multiple partner banks, up to $1M combined aggregate
accounts.joint_account_notes: Individual accounts only. No joint account option.

rate_tiers.note: Additional 0.50% bonus for Core/Premium tiers with direct deposit

accounts.debit_transactions: Unlimited free transactions and transfers.
new_features: Direct deposit bonus (0.50%) for qualifying tiers

accounts.base_rate_note: Core tier rate for TFSA/RRSP (~1.25%). Exact rates vary by account type.

accounts.e_transfer_notes: Not available on registered accounts. Standard TFSA/RRSP withdrawal rules apply.

accounts.cdic_notes: CDIC coverage via Peoples Bank of Canada. Deposits aggregate with direct Peoples Bank holdings for CDIC limits.
accounts.joint_account_notes: Joint accounts available for married/common-law couples only, not for business partners or friends

rate_tiers.note: Advertised as 'up to 3%' but actual posted rate is 2.90%

accounts.debit_transactions: Unlimited free withdrawals and transfers.
new_features: Tiered rate structure with no minimum balance
